name: SignalWire
description: SignalWire — Developer CPaaS platform for voice, SMS, video, and AI voice agents built on FreeSWITCH.

seo.title: SignalWire — Messaging API (Email / SMS / Voice)
seo.meta_description: SignalWire: SignalWire — Developer CPaaS platform for voice, SMS, video, and AI voice agents built on FreeSWITCH.

when_to_use: AI voice agent with FreeSWITCH-grade reliability
Twilio alternative for voice and SMS at lower cost
Video conferencing API for healthcare telehealth apps
Programmable voice with SWML scripting for call flows
CPaaS platform for custom contact center applications

pros: Built on FreeSWITCH by its original maintainers
Competitive voice pricing vs Twilio for many routes
Programmable voice, SMS, video and AI agents
SWML and AI voice agent tooling is differentiated
cons: Smaller ecosystem and community than Twilio
Some product polish and docs still maturing
AI pricing model can be hard to predict
review.verdict: Developer-friendly CPaaS with serious voice/AI chops; realistic Twilio alternative if you are price-sensitive.
review.best_for: Developers building voice, video or AI voice agent products with budget discipline
review.not_for: Teams needing the widest global SMS footprint or biggest integration catalog
